description: Format the raw text excerpt of The Cherry Orchard located at ~/Documents/TextDocuments/cherry_orchard_raw.txt into a standard theatrical script. The final document must have a global font size of 12pt. Format the scene heading ('ACT I') as Bold and Center aligned, and the opening scene description paragraph as Italicized. All standalone Character Names ('LOPAKHIN', 'DUNYASHA') must be Center aligned. All inline, bracketed stage directions must be Italicized, while spoken dialogue remains Left aligned without bold or italics. Save the formatted document as a DOCX file at ~/Documents/TextDocuments/cherry_orchard_script.docx.
